data.title: Balancer suspends reCLAMM-related liquidity pools for security investigation.
data.description: Balancer announced on the X platform that it received a security report from the bug bounty platform Immunefi regarding Balancer's reCLAMM (re-adjustment of centralized liquidity AMM). Out of an abundance of caution, Balancer has suspended the operation of the relevant liquidity pool during the investigation. Currently, user funds are safe and fully accessible, and further updates will be provided.

data.title: Tokenized Real-World Assets Grow Amid Crypto Market Downturn
data.description:
Tokenized real-world assets (RWA) have demonstrated consistent growth despite the prevailing bearish sentiment in the cryptocurrency market. According to NS3.AI, the value of distributed tokenized assets increased by 8.68% over the past month. In contrast, decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols have faced a significant 25% drop in total value locked (TVL).

Experts suggest that this trend reflects a shift in capital within the crypto space, as investors seek less risky tokenized assets that offer stable returns and regulatory clarity. This movement is seen not as an exit from the crypto market but rather as a maturation of capital, indicating a preference for assets with more predictable outcomes.

data.title: The three whales who shorted ETH have already made a total unrealized profit of over $24 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, as the market stabilizes, the total unrealized profit of the three whales shorting ETH has exceeded $24 million, including: - Whale “0xed4” holding a 25x leveraged short position with an unrealized profit of $8.8 million; - Whale “0x0b0” holding a 20x leveraged short position with an unrealized profit of $8.4 million; - Whale “0x20c” holding a 25x leveraged short position with an unrealized profit of $8.4 million.

data.title: Balancer Temporarily Halts Liquidity Pools Following Security Report
data.description: On February 20, Balancer announced the temporary suspension of certain liquidity pools after receiving a security report from the bug bounty platform Immunefi. According to BlockBeats, the report concerns Balancer's reCLAMM (re-adjusted concentrated liquidity AMM). As a precautionary measure, Balancer has paused the operations of the affected pools during the investigation. User funds remain secure and fully accessible, and further updates will be provided as the situation develops.

data.title: U.S. Imports from Taiwan Surpass China Amid Trade Shifts
data.description: The United States has imported more goods from Taiwan than from China for the first time in decades, marking a significant shift in trade patterns. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this change is largely attributed to U.S. President Donald Trump's tariff policies, which have altered trade flows. Additionally, the global surge in demand for artificial intelligence technology has increased the need for tech products, further influencing this trend. This development underscores the evolving dynamics in international trade and the impact of geopolitical strategies on economic relationships.

data.title: Fed’s Kashkari lashes crypto and stablecoins, praises AI
data.description:
Minneapolis Fed President Neel Kashkari says crypto is “utterly useless” compared to AI, and that pro-stablecoin arguments are “a buzzword salad. ”
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/fed-neel-kashkari-lashes-crypto-and-stablecoins?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Risk-Off Capital Shifts Toward Tokenized Assets as DeFi Pulls Back
data.description:
Capital is rotating out of DeFi into tokenized assets as experts say the shift reflects maturing markets, not capitulation.
source: https://decrypt.co/358693/risk-off-capital-shifts-toward-tokenized-assets-defi-pulls-back

data.title: XRP Price Downside Momentum Builds Amid Fading Recovery Hopes
data.description:
XRP price extended losses and traded below $1. 40. The price is now consolidating losses but faces hurdles near $1. 4320 and $1
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-price-downside-momentum-1-45/

data.title: X to roll out Smart Cashtags for trading data
data.description:
X will introduce Smart Cashtags within weeks, offering in-timeline stock and crypto data as part of a broader financial services expansion.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/x-to-roll-out-smart-cashtags-for-trading-data/

data.title: Will Ripple Buy A Bank? Garlinghouse Dodges But The Trail Is Clear
data.description:
Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse sidestepped a direct question about whether the company would ever buy a bank, using the moment instead to restate Ripple’s institutional-first strategy and argue that clearer US rules are already unlocking demand for stablecoins and XRP Ledger based payments. Speaking with James Hasso at the Economic Club of New York on Feb. 18, Garlinghouse was asked whether Ripple might acquire a bank outright or lean into tighter partnerships as it works with large financial institutions and builds out its stablecoin business. “I’m going to dodge part of your question answer,” Garlinghouse said, before pivoting into why Ripple has historically embraced banks rather than positioning itself against them
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/xrp-news/will-ripple-buy-a-bank-garlinghouse/

data.title: BTCC Exchange taps USDT settlement in TradFi platform launch to bridge traditional and crypto markets
data.description:
BTCC, one of the world’s longest-serving cryptocurrency exchanges, has launched BTCC TradFi, a cross-market feature offering users direct access to forex, commodities, indices, and stocks in addition to its precious metals offerings, all margined and settled in USDT. As of the second quarter of 2025, global forex trading volumes hit a record $9. 6 trillion per […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/btcc-exchange-taps-usdt-settlement-in-tradfi-platform-launch-to-bridge-traditional-and-crypto-markets/

data.title: OpenClaw widens reach amid CVE-2026-25253 exploit chain
data.description:
OpenClaw ClawHub malicious skills, Atomic Stealer, CVE-2026-25253 hit SSH, wallet and API keys via Markdown lures and RCE chain; rotate keys and patch.
source: https://coincu.com/news/openclaw-widens-reach-amid-cve-2026-25253-exploit-chain/

data.title: Japan's Manufacturing Activity Remains Strong for Third Month
data.description: Japan's manufacturing sector continued to expand for the third consecutive month, driven by robust production levels. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this sustained growth reflects a positive corporate outlook as Prime Minister Takaichi gears up to advance her investment strategies. The consistent expansion in manufacturing suggests a stable economic environment, supporting the government's economic initiatives.

data.title: Norway Denies Joining U.S.-Led Peace Committee
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump recently stated that Norway had agreed to join a 'Peace Committee.' According to Jin10, this claim was refuted by Norwegian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Arne Jorem on February 19. Jorem reiterated that Norway will not participate in the U.S.-initiated 'Peace Committee.'

data.title: White House Advocates Limited Stablecoin Rewards
data.description: Scott Melker, host of The Wolf Of All Streets Podcast, posted on X that the White House is advocating for limited stablecoin rewards. The administration is urging banks to advance crypto legislation, emphasizing the need for regulatory clarity in the digital currency sector. This move is part of a broader effort to integrate stablecoins into the financial system while ensuring consumer protection and financial stability.

data.title: ZeruAI Launches AgentScan on Base Chain
data.description: On February 20, ZeruAI announced the launch of its artificial intelligence agent discovery page, AgentScan, on the Base chain. According to BlockBeats, agents can register, generate behavior-based zScores, and be publicly discovered. AgentScan is built on ERC-8004 and utilizes ZeruAI's behavioral intelligence technology, integrating data from various registration institutions. Additionally, agents can install AgentScan skills via npm.

data.title: Standard Chartered CFO Departure and HSBC Acquisition Impact Earnings Reports
data.description: Standard Chartered's unexpected departure of its finance chief is set to have significant implications as the bank prepares to report its earnings. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the potential impact of this leadership change on the bank's financial performance. Meanwhile, HSBC's recent multibillion-dollar acquisition of a bank stake is also under scrutiny as it prepares to release its earnings report. The financial community is closely watching how these developments will influence the banks' strategies and market positions. Both institutions are navigating complex financial landscapes, and their upcoming earnings reports are expected to provide insights into their future directions.

data.title: FreeRide AI Launches Live Quantitative Trading Competition
data.description: FreeRide AI has announced a seven-day live quantitative trading competition commencing on February 24. According to NS3.AI, the event will feature eight prominent AI models from China and the United States, competing in real-time cryptocurrency markets. The competition focuses on autonomous trading with institutional-grade risk controls. Participants are invited to predict outcomes to earn rewards without the need to invest principal. Following the event, FreeRide plans to invite community users to test its AI Trading Agent, which integrates advanced AI capabilities with professional trading standards.

data.title: Japan's Fiscal Package Raises Concerns Over National Debt and Bitcoin Impact
data.description: Japan's government has unveiled a fiscal package that includes record spending, tax cuts, and debt-financed deficits, resulting in national debt surpassing 250% of GDP. According to NS3.AI, this development heightens pressure on the Bank of Japan to increase interest rates, a move that historically leads to substantial Bitcoin selloffs due to yen carry trade unwinds. Despite this, the ongoing growth in debt strengthens Bitcoin's long-term appeal as a safeguard against sovereign debt risks and currency depreciation.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Former Ukrainian Commander Allegedly Approved Nord Stream Pipeline Sabotage
data.description:
On February 20, Jin10 reported that Germany's Der Spiegel magazine cited sources claiming that Valeriy Zaluzhnyi, the former commander of the Ukrainian military and Ukraine's ambassador to the UK, approved the sabotage of the Nord Stream gas pipelines. According to Jin10, the report states that the decision was made by Zaluzhnyi without the approval of Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky, indicating that the Zelensky administration was unaware of the sabotage plan.

It is reported that the U.S. Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) was aware of the plan to explode the Nord Stream pipelines beforehand. In 2022, CIA personnel reportedly met with Ukrainian officials in Kyiv, where Ukrainian experts explained the idea of destroying the gas pipelines to the Americans.
